en: Does your company have a documented WHMIS (Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System) program/policy?
Does your company have a documented Picker Trucks training program/policy?
Does your company have a documented TDG (Transport Dangerous Goods) employee training program?
Does your company have a documented Mineral Fibers program?
Does your company have a documented Power Line Clearances program?
Does your company have a documented Waste Disposal program?
Does your company have General Health and Safety meetings?

Does your company have a program that addresses procedures for calling the appropriate one call center at least 72 hours before digging, driving equipment into the ground or engaging in any earth-moving activities?
Does your company have drivers certified to transport dangerous goods (TDG)?
Do offsite company personnel perform frequent Audits/Assessments?
